description: MCP resource map for the Visual Intelligence Archive. Each entry maps a URI to a file in the repository.

resources.name: Witness
resources.description: The witness concept: interpretation depends on the observer, archive, and context

resources.name: Description vs Inference
resources.description: How to separate observable description from derived inference

resources.name: Recurrence
resources.description: Pattern repetition as a precondition for significance — not evidence of it

resources.name: Symbolic Candidate
resources.description: A recurring form that may carry compressed meaning, pending contextual judgment

resources.name: Archive Context
resources.description: Dataset, curation history, and framing biases that shape machine reading

resources.name: Interpretive Restraint
resources.description: Assigning significance cautiously, explicitly, and only with stated context

resources.name: Prohibited Inferences
resources.description: Seven hard constraints on what agents must not infer

resources.name: The Viewer
resources.description: Source philosophy: witness, machine vision, and what it means for a machine to read an image

resources.name: Art for AI
resources.description: The difference between machine reading and human seeing, and why it matters

resources.name: Visual Intelligence Processing Model v1
resources.description: Step-by-step processing model and interpretive cautions for agents
